contents: working-tree tarballs excluding .git, generated caches, node_modules, virtualenvs, and common secret files
status, diffstat, tracked/untracked file lists, SHA256SUMS

non_destructive_policy: no git clean before source inventory
no force-push or branch pruning before bundle backup
no repo archiving/privatizing before unique assets are classified
no public setup docs pointing at stale repos or non-shipped commands

legacy_repos.name: borg-init
legacy_repos.decision: keep or import as installer adjunct; not canonical product repo

legacy_repos.name: borg-collective-v1
legacy_repos.decision: preserve as private service prototype; not superseded by canonical local package

legacy_repos.name: borg-collective-py
legacy_repos.role: Python SDK/CLI/MCP client for hosted federation
legacy_repos.decision: preserve; not superseded by canonical local package

legacy_repos.name: guild-v2 / guild-tools
legacy_repos.role: older runtime predecessor and experiment line
legacy_repos.decision: selectively migrate or archive unique experiments before any cleanup

legacy_repos.name: guild-packs
legacy_repos.decision: preserve registry snapshot; markdown examples are not lossless replacements

legacy_repos.name: guild-benchmark
legacy_repos.role: benchmark harness with executable challenge fixtures
legacy_repos.decision: preserve as eval fixtures or keep private benchmark repo

legacy_repos.name: guild-mcp-package
legacy_repos.decision: archive only after compatibility decision; not a git repo

public_confusion_fixed: examples/skills/borg/SKILL.md stale homepage and borgd compatibility text
borg/seeds_data/borg/SKILL.md stale homepage and borgd compatibility text
borg-init README/package metadata now identify it as an installer adjunct and point to the canonical Borg-Directory repo
remaining_operator_gated: decide whether hosted federation service repos become public later
decide whether old private Guild repos are archived read-only
